The Wind Rises

風立ちぬ

"We must live."

7.8
2013MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

A lifelong love of flight inspires Japanese aviation engineer Jiro Horikoshi, whose storied career includes the creation of the A-6M World War II fighter plane.
